hero.question: Will One Battle After Another win Best Cinematography at the 98th Academy Awards?
hero.prob_take: Smart money is loading up on One Battle After Another as the film gains serious Oscar buzz heading into the final voting stretch, moving the needle 3 points in 24 hours on accumulating conviction. At 75.5%, you're pricing in nearly certain wins over Dune: Part Two and other technical contenders, but cinematography voters historically back spectacle and innovation over pure craftsmanship, making this overcooked for a category that loves surprises.

daily_take.headline: Hollywood's consensus bet on One Battle After Another looks overcooked at 75%.
daily_take.deck: Cinematography odds jumped 3 points overnight as industry chatter turned bullish, but 75% pricing assumes near-certainty in a category that historically stays competitive. The film entered awards season as a dark horse. Sharp bettors should fade the momentum here. Look for value on contenders like Didi or The Shrouds as contrarian positions before the actual voting bloc speaks.
